prompt: Create a polished 60-second landscape product demo for Squid Agent, an AI app builder for founders, developers, designers, and product teams. Use voice-over narration only. Keep the real Squid Agent product screenshots on screen as the primary visual proof. Use every attached screenshot at least once, in the order provided, with smooth crops, subtle push-ins, cursor-style callouts, and clean motion-graphic chapter transitions. Do not replace the screenshots with generic stock footage or fabricated interfaces. Narration concept: Most AI app builders give you a pretty preview and hide the rest. Squid Agent shows the whole build. Start with a plain-language idea. Squid turns it into an architecture plan, writes the React app file by file, and streams the source in real time. When the preview hits a syntax error, Squid detects it and repairs the exact component automatically, without charging another credit. Then inspect the working app, open the quality report to see resolved imports and accessibility warnings, and export a verified source bundle with deployment configs for Vercel, Netlify, and Cloudflare Workers. Build faster. See what happened. Keep the code. Squid Agent: research, plan, build, own. Start building at squidagent.app. Feature walkthrough: Home and prompt: establish plain-language app creation and visible model and credit context. Planning and code generation: highlight the architecture plan, file-by-file React generation, and live code editor. Automatic repair: show the real JSX error, exact component repair, and no extra credit charged. Finished preview: showcase the working Orbit finance dashboard. Quality review: show 11 generated files, 17 resolved imports, protected-path checks, and specific accessibility warnings. Export: show verified ZIP export plus Vercel, Netlify, and Workers-ready configuration. CRITICAL ON-SCREEN TEXT (display literally): Turn ideas into apps; Research. Plan. Build. Own.; Writing your app; No credits charged; 11 files; 17 imports resolved; Static quality report; Verify & download ZIP; squidagent.app. Tone: Confident, knowledgeable, and product-led, like a senior product engineer giving a crisp live demo to a colleague. Clear and direct, not a hype-heavy sales pitch. This script is a concept and theme to convey — not a verbatim transcript. You have full creative freedom to improve flow and fill the duration naturally. Do not pad with silence or pauses. STYLE — DIGITAL GRID: Dark near-black and deep navy foundation with electric blue and violet accents sampled from the screenshots. Crisp modern sans-serif typography. Motion graphics annotate real interface details without obscuring them. Restrained parallax, smooth push-ins, clean grid wipes, and subtle UI glow. Keep screenshots sharp, legible, correctly proportioned, and free of fake device frames. Include a short branded intro, compact chapter transitions, and a clean end card with Start building at squidagent.app.
